name: /risk-classify: for a high-risk use case, obligations list is non-empty (EU AI Act Title III chapter 2 references)
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case credit-scoring --emit "$PWD/compliance/risk-classification.yaml" && grep -E "^obligations:" compliance/risk-classification.yaml 1>&2 && grep -E "^  - " compliance/risk-classification.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
